title: Cronquistianthus urubambensis
taxonomy: Cronquistianthus urubambensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Cronquistianthus, which is a group of plants closely related to the genus Chuquiraga. The plant is native to Peru and is also known as the Urubamba Chuquiraga. The classification of Cronquistianthus urubambensis reflects its unique characteristics and its position within the Asteraceae family. The classification is based on a combination of morphological and molecular evidence.
